title: Chocolate Milk
description: The Cows are brown right? Therefore they should give chocolate milk!
body:
# Chocolate Milk
-----------------------------------
Every look at a Cow and go? Man that thing is brown! Why is it dropping normal milk, instead of chocolate milk? Well I have now solved that for you! Featuring the Chocolate Milk resource pack!

All milk is now Chocolate Milk which means that Cake is now also Chocolate Cake, and all Cows are now Chocolate Cows! Enjoy!
